---
name: Add evidence record
about: Propose a new bibliographic evidence record (paper, blog, talk, dataset)
title: "[evidence] "
labels: evidence-only
---

## Evidence to add

- IRI (suggested): `evidence:...`
- Type: Paper / Blog / Talk / Dataset / FormalizationProject
- Author(s):
- Stable URL:
- DOI (if applicable):
- Date (YYYY-MM-DD):
- One-sentence summary (statement of factual content, not opinion):

## What does this evidence support or counter?

- Supports claim(s):
- Counters claim(s):
- Or: standalone (no claim attached yet)

## Confirmation

- [ ] I have verified the URL is reachable as of submission date.
- [ ] I am not redistributing copyrighted PDF/figures/prose; only
      a stable link and statement-level summary.
- [ ] I am not asserting that this evidence "settles" the dispute.
